name: Cheesy Chicken Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare rice according to directions or your desired preference.
2. Set aside.
3. Cut the chicken into small chunks and cook through either on the stove top or in the microwave. You can cook it first and then cut it up, or chop it up first and then cook it.
4. Chop onion and peppers into small pieces.
5. Saute onion and pepper in butter for about 4 minutes or until tender.
6. Cut ham slice into small cube-like pieces (any kind of ham, sliced, diced, cubed would work).
7. Stir in the cooked chicken, cubed ham, soup (from the can), and milk. Heat until chicken is hot, stirring frequently.
8. Stir the rice into the mixture and cook for a few more minutes until everything is hot. Ensure the rice is thoroughly mixed in.
9. The dish will keep well if prepared ahead of time and reheated before serving. Just be sure to heat it and mix it again well before serving. It also freezes well if you make an extra batch.
